title: cozy-kit Plugin Metadata
description: Schema for cozy_kit_plugins metadata.json files. Add '$schema' pointing here for IDE autocomplete.

$schema.description: URI of this schema — enables IDE autocomplete.

description.description: Short human-readable summary of what this plugin does.

author.description: Plugin author name or email address.

target.description: cozy_kit class this plugin patches (e.g. 'Greeting'). Omit for standalone plugins.

methods.description: Names of functions (or methods) the engine file must define.

items.description: Plugin name with optional PEP 440 specifier, e.g. 'base_plugin>=1.0,<2.0'.

dependencies.description: Other cozy-kit plugins this plugin depends on.

min_cozy_kit_version.description: Minimum cozy_kit package version required at runtime, e.g. '1.0.6'.

tags.description: Keywords for discovery and filtering, e.g. ['text', 'formatter'].

conflict_with.description: Plugin names that cannot be enabled at the same time as this plugin.
